acceptance_method.name: bonferroni-familywise-single-future-observation-prediction
acceptance_method.source: NIST/SEMATECH Engineering Statistics Handbook: prediction limits, Bonferroni method, and Student-t critical-value table

supersession_reason: Candidate v1 used raw pilot extrema as future-run limits. Fresh Confirmation v3 rejected that brittle derivation. Candidate v2 is calculated from the original Pilot v3 data only; failed confirmation measurements are excluded from every bound.
filter_padlen_basis: The approved fifth-order Butterworth design has three SOS sections and one first-order section. Applying the documented scipy.signal.sosfiltfilt default-padlen structure formula yields 18 samples; P0-R5 must verify this against the generated coefficients.
